NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF

LAW AND MOTION 301, NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MARY KNUTSON'S MOTION TO SEAL RECORDS AND REGISTER OF ACTIONS IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENTS FOR SEALING UNLAWFUL DETAINER RECORDS SET OUT IN C.C.P. SECTION 1161.2, EVEN IF C.R.C. 2.550 AND 2.551 ALLOWED SEALING RECORDS ALREADY ON THE PUBLIC FILES. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT SHE MEETS ANY OF THE CRITERIA UNDER THOSE RULES. DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING SIDE OF HER INTENT TO APPEAR. THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT ON THE MOTION. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189.

calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn, Mtn, In Support Of Mtn To Seal Records And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Aug-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Mary Knutson, 415-368-8672, defendant and moving party appearing proporia persona

RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT MARY KNUTSON'S MOTION To Seal Records And Register Of Actions IS DENIED. DEFENDANT DOES NOT MEET THE REQUIREMENTS FOR SEALING UNLAWFUL DETAINER RECORDS SET OUT IN C.C.P. SECTION 1161.2, EVEN IF C.R.C. 2.550 AND 2.551 ALLOWED SEALING RECORDS ALREADY ON THE PUBLIC FILES. DEFENDANT HAS NOT SHOWN THAT SHE MEETS ANY OF THE CRITERIA UNDER THOSE RULES.
DEFENDANT DID NOT NOTIFY OPPOSING SIDE OF HER INTENT TO APPEAR. THEREFORE THE COURT COULD NOT HEAR ARGUMENT ON THE MOTION. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189. (301/PJB/CK)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2004 Text Ruling

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-18-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. ACTION SETTLED. TRIAL DATE VACATED. SETT AGREEMENT AND STIP AND ORDER FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IN THE EVENT OF DEFAULT IS SIGNED AND FILED THIS DATE. SETTLEMENT PLACED ON THE RECORD PER STIP AND ORDER, AS FOLLOWS:PLTF AND DEFT ENTER INTO THE FOLLOWING SETT AGREEMENT, AND STIP FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WITH REFERENCE TO REAL PROPERTY AT 3434 18TH ST, S.F. CA. 94110.THE EXPIRED 3-DAY NOTICE TERMINATED THE TENANCY RIGHTS OF DEFT. THE LEASE AND RENTAL AGREEMENTS BY WHICH DEFT HELD POSSESSION ARE DEEMED FORFEITED.DEFT SHALL RETAIN POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES, PROVIDED DEFT DOES THE FOLLOWING:PAYS THE SUM OF $350.00 (UNPAID RENT AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES FOR THE PERIOD OF 7-1-04 TO 8-31-04, IN 10 DAYS OF EXECUTION OF THIS AGREEMENT BY PLTF. DEFT MAY MAKE ANY PREPAYMENT WITHOUT PENALTY. BEGINNING 8-18-04, AND CONTINUING UNTIL 7-31-05, AND SO LONG AS DEFT REMAINS IN POSESSION OF THE PREMISES, DEFT SHALL PAY THE SUM OF $175.00, NO LATER THAT THE 5TH DAY OF THE MONTH, WHICH THE PARTIES AGREE IS THE DEFT'S PORTION OF THE FAIR RENTAL VALUE OF THE PREMISES.BEGINNING IMMEDIATELY AND CONTINUING UNTIL 7-31-05, DEFT SHALL NOT ALLOW THE PERSON(S) KNOWN AS "JOE", "JOSEPH FRANCISCO FIGUERO", "JOSEPH TONE" AND/OR "LARRY" INTO THE PREMISES; OR ANY PERSON WHO HAS CREATED ANY NUISANCE OR SUBSTANTIAL INTERFERENCE WITH THE QUIET ENJOYMENT OF ANY PERSON IN THE BLDG, TO ENTER INTO THE BLDG OR PREMISES.AND, SHALL NOT GIVE A KEY TO SAID PERSONS. AND SHALL NOT SUBLET THE PREMISES OR ASSIGN INTEREST IN THE PREMISES.AND, SHALL HAVE NO ROOMMATES; AND, SHALL NOT ALLOW ANY GUEST TO SPEND THE NIGHT IN THE PREMISES WITHOUT PLTF'S PERMISSION.THERE SHALL BE NO LOUD OR OFFENSIVE CONDUCT BY DEFT OR HER VISITORS; NO LOUD MUSIC;LOUD PARTIES;YELLING,SHOUTING,SWEARING,SCREAMING ARGUING, USING OR SELLING DRUGS.NO PHYSICAL ASSAULTS;NO VIOLNCE AGAINST TENANTS, MGT STAFF OR VISITORS TO BLDG.BY DEFT OR HER GUESTS.(SEE STIP & ORDER FOR FURTHER TERMS.)JDG PRO TEM:DAVID ELIGATOR;(DEPT. 218)
